query:
SELECT id, poNumber, batchNo, serialNumber, imei, productName, sheetRowNumber, archivedAt
FROM products
WHERE batchNo IN ('NO-IMPORT-BATCH-1778749383598', '00500025410', 'Q49QF04603')
ORDER BY batchNo, id;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 27YhjuzT1vAAGri.3f5f101aaba8 --database F4LQWhZd9GGdmJuBm98r2c --execute SELECT id, poNumber, batchNo, serialNumber, imei, productName, sheetRowNumber, archivedAt
FROM products
WHERE batchNo IN ('NO-IMPORT-BATCH-1778749383598', '00500025410', 'Q49QF04603')
ORDER BY batchNo, id;
